a wild tiger  

Monster
  • View
  • History
  • Media
  • Discuss
  • Tools
    • Main page
    • Print this page
    • What links here
    • Recent changes
    • Wiki search


Uploaded April 26th, 2014 by wiscookie
Updated April 28th, 2014

  • Social: Yes
  • Maximum hit: 941
  • Placeholder for: Cerhan the Wild
  • This mob spawns at 1330, -555, -67.
  • Respawn Timer: 21 minutes
  • Summons: No
  • Single-Target Rampages: No
  • Enrages: No
  • Stunnable: Yes
  • Rootable/snareable: Yes
  • Findable (via Ctrl-F): No
  • Perma-rooted: No
  • Flees at low health: Yes

Categories: EverQuest | Templatized
This page last modified 2010-03-03 17:42:15.

Minimum Level: 16
Maximum Level: 18
Expansion:
NPC Added: 0000-00-00 00:00:00
NPC Last Updated: 2019-05-04 22:14:20

Known Habitats:
  Toxxulia Forest

Report a correction

Post Comment
These things
QuoteReply
# Feb 17 2006 at 6:17 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591873453612
66 posts
Imma lvl 35 warrior, I purposly jumped into the pit after killing the tiger master dude. These guys were cake. Only 2 in there at the time, they could barely hit me. The wouldn't die, cause of the healers, but it'd only take me like 3 or 4 hits afore they started running. They got in the water, I have horrible swimming and got away, i've been in here another like hour and haven't seen a single sign of one coming back. Now I wait for Jojo spawn...
▲ Page top
Bad bad kitties.....
QuoteReply
# Jun 01 2005 at 11:26 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593364674450
1 post
i went to kerra island at level 46, just exploring new places, when i went to the island with these little buggers... i fell in, got attacked, climbed up the latter, and ran like there was no tommarrow, heh, as soon as i got to the water, i said "bye-bye" and swam all the way back to the main island and zoned.. heh heh...had a swimming of 180 then! >=D but beware low levels, they hit hard and run fast...lol
▲ Page top
mmm
QuoteReply
# Nov 07 2003 at 6:41 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759801853
219 posts
Just made some Mad exp on my druid twink Charming here. These guys make AWSOME pets. As i hate to kill the kerrans as this is one of my favorite villages and a great quiet place for me to go and relax.....Well my druid felt otherwise =x
▲ Page top
Buggers
QuoteReply
# Oct 29 2003 at 7:49 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592259682863
6 posts
These things are major undercons, at lvl 28 they jumped me (all 3) and continued to constantly hit me for 60+ damage, needless to say, i couldnt even make it up the ladder in time to die... stupid buggers
▲ Page top
Bad Kitties
QuoteReply
# Feb 28 2003 at 2:57 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591786158388
Scholar
36 posts
I was an 18 ranger, having a little fun killing wharf rats, trying to get up my faction with the Kerrans. See this guy on track and went to go kill it, cons DB. I looked into it's pit and it just jumped me, as well as the two other Kerrans who were standing there. I made it about ten steps. Even though there were two Kerrans after me, and it might have been one of them, I am pretty sure the Wild Tiger hit me for over 60 damage one time. I was NOT very happy, so now I'm going to slaughter the entire Island, one or two dirty pussies at a time.
▲ Page top
Buggars
QuoteReply
# May 31 2002 at 1:47 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Was exploring Kerra isle. Cool place. Sad that people kill those pretty kitty people. Even sadder that those tigers kill me. They spawn on that black island with pumas on it, in a little circle only accessable by jumping on top of the "walls" there.
▲ Page top
strange...
QuoteReply
# Mar 04 2002 at 9:39 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595780149685
2 posts
I hunted the kerrans from lev 14 to midway through 15, i'm a halfling druid, and my faction is just a tiny wee bit above kos to the kerrans now.... thing is i've never been attacked by these thing, but i have a friend who's a barbarian shamen (level 9) and on 2 occasions when i've been mini-powerleveling him here (well trying) these things have just appeared (always 2 of them) and attacked, and killed him...

i didn't stick around to see if they would aggro on me too, i zoned, but when i think back they would have had enough time to get from killing him to attacking me before i zoned but they didn't...

the other thing is, i've explored the whole place a few times, even walked right up to the pit on the island and never seen the slightest sign of these thing...

anyone know if their aggro is based somewhat on race or class also? for example, any other druids been attacked by them, or are we the lucky ones? =p
▲ Page top
Click
QuoteReply
# Feb 28 2002 at 11:50 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758946743
View User Forum
25 posts
Hehe, I'd like to commend the photographer on his wonderful screen shot!
▲ Page top
Where do they come from?
QuoteReply
# Nov 08 2001 at 8:39 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
How is it that they aren't even there but aggro anyways? I was wandering around Kerra Isle and next thing I know, I being hit by the tigers who weren't even there, they just appeared right on me and hit in the 40's... to say the least, I'm getting my corpse this weekend, finding a party and making that 20% exp bonus worth it by killing all the cats
▲ Page top
wild tiger
QuoteReply
# Oct 24 2001 at 1:31 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
So if I'm going to Kerra Isle with the guild for a wedding, but stay FAR FAR away from the tiger island, nothing will jump me, right? since i won't be going for quests or exp, just a ceremony... and if we stay off tiger island and stay around the Temple and areas like that, we'll be safe? *crosses fingers*

QuoteReply

295 posts
Toasted my lvl 34 shaman; the things just dont like to die, and they aggro no matter your lvl.

The tiger is so cute

I prefer the puma)
▲ Page top
A Wild Tiger!
QuoteReply
# May 31 2001 at 3:08 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758283725
5 posts
Ok After a longer time at 32 I had researched the Kerran's which I first heard of from the upcoming release of Shadows of Luclin! So I took a vacation to the isle knowing that none of the kitties would hurt me, not having so much as attacked then. But I heard about evil necros living on the small Island there. Well I did the sharp tooth quest SEVERAL time. I only was doing it for the faction with Kerra which I kinda blew on my second trip to the island, but that's a WHOLE other story.
Swam out to the island hugged the kerra Pumas out there...awww roar. roamed around a bit, Climbed up this wall and saw a kerran warrior of some sort, looking around I spotted 2 other kerrans (casting!) when all of the sudden WHACK! A Wild tiger hits you for 35 points of damage...the warrior who conned indifferent to me started punching me (mind you the ONLY thing I did was get hit, FAST AND HARD! Of course falling in this pit the tigers seem to live in did NOT help since I am NO GOOD with ladders! I died 3 TIMES THAT TRIP, but then proceeded to CLIMB REALLY REALLY fast...till ALMOST 36. =(
I have been to Kerra island a couple of time, and I WILL go back, I want the kerran fishing pole...love to intterrupt while getting my own spells off.
Tuasai Skywatcher <Forgotten Guard>
35 Cleric
E. Marr Server
▲ Page top
wrong lvl
QuoteReply
# Feb 15 2001 at 9:27 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591752098906
View User Forum
37 posts
These are red to my 19 ranger
▲ Page top
DAMN hard
QuoteReply
# Dec 18 2000 at 12:47 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous

Me (29 bard) and a 29 druid friend were exploring the isle (mainly looking for jojo, I want the claws for the look, even though I know they stink, fun to run around with them). So we figure he'll be on the tiger isle, and swim to there. Everything we've seen till then is low green and nonaggro. So we get on the isle, and get jumped by two wild tigers. They're both low green so I figure no problem right? WRONG, they hit as hard as a white, or a high blue at least, and once we started fighting them a blue kerran shaman joined in and started healing them... We killed all three but I had 2 bubs of health left and the druid was OOM... and if my Staff of Writhing hadn't proced 5 times in the battle for full damage each time we probly would have died... having a DEX of 133 is nice =)
▲ Page top
Monks can dispatch these
QuoteReply
# Sep 04 2000 at 7:46 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I was level 30 and had goten all the parts that the quest for treant fist required I went to the island and these things attack me. I got scard and Feigned Death they wondered off and I did the quest. I went back and this time I was feeling pissed so I killed em cept kerrans agroed and then I went on a killing spree. On top of that I got reported by newbies that thought I was KSing. I had an essier time getting my J boots at 35 and my robe of lost circle (with friends) at 35 (well maybe I had an essier time with this than getting those two items). After that I tried to get robe of whistling fists but that was a crap load harder.
▲ Page top
givelovemithmar
QuoteReply
# Aug 27 2000 at 11:15 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
well i knew to avoid the island but i guess i got too close and pulled the tiger. i got spun around and swan into the middle of the lake away from any of the kerrrans. I fought in the water and killed it after going oom and having less than a bubble of health left at level 17.i think if you just avoid other kerrrans youll be ok
▲ Page top
Damn Tigers
QuoteReply
# Aug 18 2000 at 12:33 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591749876646
10 posts
I was swimming and one jumped me. Fearing I would agro all of Kerra Isle, I didn't fight back..just ran. Well I got lost and to add insult to injury the shamans gave the tiger SoW and a few otehr buffs. Needless to say I died a very embarassing death. Do not go swimming unless you know exactly where you are and where the tiger is. It hits in the 40's on a regular basis.
▲ Page top
damn tiger!
QuoteReply
# Aug 11 2000 at 5:53 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
This tiger is a tough sob.he hits for around 40dmg and he hits FAST.Plus once he attacks you the other kerrans in there will aggro onto you..or at least some did on me.All i can say is if you cant take him swim your *** of and zone :P
▲ Page top
Aqua Kitties
QuoteReply
# Jun 24 2000 at 11:38 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I was innocently swimming around looking for the supposed Razortooth, when two of these guys jumped me. Bah, I thought, I am level 32 and they are green. Well, my health dropped fast but I was winning, only they fled quickly, even snared, and I lost them. They came back and I got one, but the other got healed up by a Kerran and jumped me again, this time with another high green Kerran in tow. Alas, I died. How embarassing. Anyway.. they hit hard.. usually for 30+.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 18 2000 at 8:17 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Hi im a lvl 30 druid and i JUST made it out alive when this tiger attacked me on the isle that has JoJo on it.He hit for 40 almost every time, by the time i zoned i had 4 hp left(with skin like steel) also the kerrans SoW the little #$@%&* so u need SoC or Scale of wolf to outrun it YEESH!
Damn tigers
QuoteReply
# May 23 2000 at 2:32 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I am a level 25 warrior. As I was exploring the island looking for Jojo one of these Tigers jumped me. Then after one swing of my axe 2 Kerrans leaped into the fight and proceeded to beat me down. So just so you all know, the Kerrans will protect the Tigers.......

bad asses

i am lvl 39! they aggroed me and 3 almost killed me thank the gods for loh!

This thing hits WAY to hard...44 or so...and almost never misses me at lvl 18 with my 450 ac...total miscon =) Be carefl. and it even agros on 50's. and I think it sees invis. be VERY careful
